claim: De novo assembly of sequence data has more specific contigs than unassembled sequence data.

result.claim: De novo assembly of sequence data has more specific contigs than unassembled sequence data.
result.reasoning: The searches for propositions and chunks related to "De novo assembly of sequence data has more specific contigs than unassembled sequence data," "specificity of contigs in de novo assembly," "de novo assembly contig quality," "de novo assembly," and "contigs" did not yield any direct evidence to support or refute the claim. The retrieved information was largely unrelated to the comparison of contig specificity between de novo assembled and unassembled sequence data. Therefore, there is insufficient evidence within the knowledge base to verify the claim.
